channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Water still leaking in Warburton Road, 13th March
item.description:
Water leak reported to Thames Water who say it is not leaking from their network but a private network that Hackney Council would have a record of . Please could you find who is responsible for this metal cover/network and have them repair.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mentmore Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping 115B Stoke Newington Road just out of view to the right the end of the road is a squalid mess., 13th March
item.description:
Fly Tipping 115B Stoke Newington Road just out of view to the right the end of the road is a squalid mess.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Exposed underground armoured cable, 13th March
item.description:
There’s an exposed armoured cabled sticking out of pavement directly in front of the crossing. It’s meters from the nursery entrance where lots of children cross.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Turney Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: From station to the avenue, 13th March
item.description:
Road needs sweeping after twigs and leaves are on pavement.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed base big head bold chair, black sacks, big screws sticking out of the bed base outside 28 Columbus Square, 13th March
item.description:
Chair black bags of rubbish, big head bold bed bases all outside 28 Columbus Square Square
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Columbus Square, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree, 13th March
item.description:
A tree has fallen into the road. This has been exacerbated by a car that has parked opposite the fallen tree and blocked the road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Apple Grove, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste in road, 13th March
item.description:
Seems to have been a spillage of food waste in the road outside number 68 St James’s Avenue think it would have been this morning thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St James's Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crack/subsidence across entrance to Chaucer road, 13th March
item.description:
Crack has got worse and is getting bigger which will probably result in a pot hole.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Chaucer Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large numbers of Southwark blue street cleaning bags not picked up, 13th March
item.description:
Large numbers of Southwark blue street cleaning bags not picked up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich Common, Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Xmas tree, 13th March

item.title: Abandoned bin and rubbish, 13th March

As pictured

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tottenham Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Bin store overflowing with litter have seen a rat, 13th March
item.description:
Filthy & Vermious bin store. The picture I've just shared isn't actually from a recent picture, although it's probably worse now. This is actually from Google Maps. Clearly, the issue is long-standing, the image was from 2024. The bin store needs to be co

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tudor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and rubbish flytipped, 13th March
item.description:
Mattress and rubbish on the pavement/ street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hatcliffe Street, Greenwich

item.title: Litter poorly collected and dispersed, 13th March
item.description:
Councillor report. Please see pictures we ite particularly bad

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Large dog fouling, 13th March
item.description:
Large dog fouling, culprit is a large mongrel dog who live down the far end of Broom Mead

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broom Mead, Bexley, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 13th March
item.description:
This rubbish has been dumped as new people move into house in Oulton close

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nickelby Close, Thamesmead

item.title: Overgrown, 13th March
item.description:
Hasn't been cleared for many months

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Jago Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp column P-54-2 day burning, 13th March
item.description:
This column was originally reported in January however the fault has not been repaired correctly, Original FMS https://www.fixmystreet.com/report/8720692, please arrange for this to be rechecked.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penshurst Green, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sofa, 13th March
item.description:
This sofa has been dumped on the corner of the Fieldings and has been here for about 4 weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Fieldings, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter up and down the street following windy weather, 13th March
item.description:
There’s litter up and down the street following the bad weather recently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Samos Road, Anerley, Greater London
